allow: Bash(node -e "const si = require\('react-icons/si'\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('visual'\)\); console.log\(keys\)")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\('react-icons/si'\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('vscode'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('studio'\)\); console.log\(keys\)")
Bash(node -e "const vsc = require\('react-icons/vsc'\); const keys = Object.keys\(vsc\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('vscode'\)\); console.log\(keys.slice\(0,5\)\)")
